prompt: Microscopic insect wing revealing detailed patterns and iridescent colors, resembling stained glass.
prompt_refined: A photorealistic, extreme macro photograph of an insect wing. The wing exhibits intricate, microscopic patterns and iridescent, shimmering colors. Its delicate, translucent membrane strikingly resembles a piece of vibrant stained glass, with light illuminating its jewel-toned, patterned sections.
